atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Inject Tailwind's base, components, or utilities layers.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inline existing utility classes into custom CSS rules.

atDirectives.name: @layer
atDirectives.description: Place custom styles into Tailwind's layer system.

atDirectives.name: @config
atDirectives.description: Specify a Tailwind config file path.

atDirectives.name: @variants
atDirectives.description: Generate styles for specific variants (legacy Tailwind directive).
